sections.heading: What is ES6+ Modern JavaScript?
sections.body: Template literals, destructuring, spread/rest, modules, and classes. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
ES6+ Modern JavaScript is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind ES6+ Modern JavaScript is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use ES6+ Modern JavaScript every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most ES6+ Modern JavaScript implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding ES6+ Modern JavaScript is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: ES6+ Modern JavaScript is a core concept in modern. Template literals, destructuring, spread/rest, modules, and classes. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
